accurate.why: Claims about the bill's provisions are consistent with the bill text and known content of this appropriations act.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; policy riders described are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 appropriations for military construction, VA, and related agencies.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes key policy riders (abortion exception, gender-affirming care ban, COVID mandate prohibition, canine research phase-out, NICS reporting restriction).

effective_dates.why: Notes FY ending September 30, 2025, and construction funds available through September 30, 2029.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits Title III related agencies (American Battle Monuments Commission, U.S. Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims, etc.) and the advance VA appropriations for FY2026.

concise.why: Reasonably concise while covering major provisions.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names VA, DOD, and Guantanamo Bay.

correct_figures.why: Correctly identifies FY2025 and September 30, 2029 availability and March 9, 2026 canine research deadline.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
